entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00010) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: NOTE; THE TOTAL AMOUNT: $2,698,643,931.00 STATED WITHIN CIMS IS INFLATED DUE TO THE VARIOUS ORDERING SCENARIOS OF BOAT HULLS DURING ALL ORDERING PERIODS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
